verbGlossary.ANIMATES: {source} elements played back in construction sequence through a 4D time-lapse simulation
verbGlossary.VISUALIZES: {source} {target} rendered as a visible state change in the 4D model
verbGlossary.HIGHLIGHTS: {target} activities emphasized within the 4D simulation to show schedule risk
verbGlossary.SIMULATES: {source}schedule replayed through {target} to compare planned versus actual sequence
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source} linked to a specific {target} for installation tracking
verbGlossary.CODED AGAINST: {source} tagged with {target} codes to enable schedule filtering and grouping
verbGlossary.FEEDS: Authored BIM geometry and metadata exported into a 4D/5D scheduling environment
verbGlossary.DECOMPOSES INTO: Building model broken down into installation zones matching {target} hierarchy levels
verbGlossary.SCOPES: {source} geometry used to define the spatial scope of a look-ahead {target} period
verbGlossary.DEFINES LOGIC FOR: Spatial adjacency and system routing in the federated model establish predecessor-successor logic
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINS: {source}requirements in {target} impose lag or lead time between activities
verbGlossary.LOADS COST INTO: Cost quantities from the 5D model allocated to {target} activities for cash-flow projection
verbGlossary.MEASURES PROGRESS FOR: {source} quantities used to calculate earned value against {target}d performance
verbGlossary.DRIVES CREW SIZING FOR: Takeoff quantities converted into labor-hour estimates to size crews for each {target}
verbGlossary.SIZES EQUIPMENT FOR: {source}determine equipment type and capacity needed per {target}
verbGlossary.INFORMS: Quantity data used as input for resource leveling across concurrent activities
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: {source} or clash result initiates a time impact analysis or recovery {target}
verbGlossary.CONSUMES: {source}issue erodes available {target} on affected schedule activities
verbGlossary.FORCES REVISION OF: Coordination resolution changes installation approach, requiring {target}
verbGlossary.IMPOSES: {source}constraint on when affected activities can proceed
verbGlossary.VALIDATES DATES IN: {source}compared against as-built {target} dates to confirm completion
verbGlossary.VERIFIES PROGRESS FOR: {source} compared to model to confirm percent complete for {target}s
verbGlossary.MEASURES: {source}calculate percent plan complete for field activities
verbGlossary.CONFIRMS FIELD STATUS FOR: Construction photos matched to {target} activities to verify field installation status
verbGlossary.REPRIORITIZES: {source} coordination meeting outcomes shift {target} priorities in the look-ahead schedule
verbGlossary.MONITORS: Digital twin streams real-time data to continuously assess {target} health metrics
verbGlossary.DETERMINES: {source} properties such as cure time or fabrication lead time establish dependency classifications
verbGlossary.MAPS TO: Level of development requirements aligned to {target} detail levels for each project phase
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: {source}issue resolution times associated with higher {target} erosion rates
